title: goniolimon tataricum f. bulgaricum
intro: Goniolimon tataricum f. bulgaricum, also known as Tatarian goniolimon, is a plant species within the family Plumbaginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which help to soothe respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Tatarian goniolimon include relief from bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Tatarian goniolimon can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
